title: Attribute Value Triplet (0x36)
description: Carries an attribute value. Offsets 0 and 1 (length and TID) are standard and omitted here. Offsets 2-3 are reserved and should be zero; offset 4..n contain the attribute value (EBCDIC).

elements.name: AttVal
elements.description: Attribute value string in EBCDIC, occupying bytes 4 through the end of the triplet payload.
